scripts.build:bin:kanna-terminal-recovery: PROFILE="${PROFILE:-debug}"; TARGET="${TARGET:-$(rustc -vV | awk '/^host:/ {print $2}')}"; case "$TARGET" in aarch64-apple-darwin) PKG_TARGET="node18-macos-arm64" ;; x86_64-apple-darwin) PKG_TARGET="node18-macos-x64" ;; *) echo "Unsupported TARGET: $TARGET" >&2; exit 1 ;; esac; if [ "$PROFILE" = "release" ]; then OUTDIR="../../.build/${TARGET}/release"; else OUTDIR="../../.build/debug"; fi; mkdir -p "$OUTDIR" && bun x pkg ./dist/index.js --targets "$PKG_TARGET" --output "$OUTDIR/kanna-terminal-recovery"
